english: v. to do nothing about something
example: Everyone had ignored her birthday, so she was going to ignore everyone

english: v. to press against something with force
example: She walked past Michael and pushed him aside.
She sat down at the table and had the delicious snack without saying a word to Mom.

english: v. to go away from a place
example: Emma replied with her mouth full as she left the kitchen without clearing the table.

english: v. to remove something from an area
example: No one cleared the room before someone pointed it out.
She went straight up to her room without saying good night to anyone.

english: v. to make your body into a round or curved shape
example: She curled up under her blanket and started to cry.
